meaning: n.(埃及神话中)导引亡灵之神,豺头人身神
examples: Hafez: I don't know any Johnny. We are looking for the bracelet of Anubis.
Jonathan: Oh good, good for you good thing to have the old bracelet of Anubis.
The Anubis Gates. Tim Powers. A modern scholar gets caught up in time travel, body- swapping, swashbuckling, and sorcery in London, circa 1810. Thing Charles Dickens meets Indiana Jones.
